title: sorghastrum incompletum
intro: Sorghastrum incompletum, also known as Yellow Indiangrass, is a type of perennial grass native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Sorghastrum incompletum include relief from fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Sorghastrum incompletum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is also used as a natural remedy in some traditional healing practices.
